params.name: Hera's Peacock Fan
params.source: Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wish Box, Wishing (0.06%)
params.description:
On Feb 18, 3000 BC, Hera made this fan using peacock feathers.
When Hera found out about Zeus' lover, Io, she ordered the hundred-eyed giant, Argos, to guard over Io to prevent Zeus from visiting her again. In order to save Io, Zeus sent Hermes and killed Argos. In retaliation against Zeus, Hera embedded Argo's eyeballs onto the feathers of her sacred bird, the peacock, and used it to make a feather fan to drive gadflies to sting cow-formed Io without rest.
